prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8170→9934→10801→10639→12959，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4789名；2025年基准约12959名，较2024年大幅后移2320 名，竞争明显加剧；本省物理类计划2021–2022年均为70人，2023–2024年69人，2025年增至73人；2026年计划78人，较2025年扩招约6.85%，扩招幅度较 大，按供需关系将推高录取位次数字。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第84名，近年排名在75–84之间小幅波动，整体层次稳定；该校近 年声誉评价平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，短视频曝光一般，报考关注度处于中等水平；电气工程为A级学科（全 国顶尖），动力工程及工程热物理为A-级，两大学科与该校核心招生专业（电气类、能源动力类）高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及 其自动化专业2024年社会热度为「高热推荐」，能源动力类专业为「推荐」，计算机/电子信息类持续偏热；本省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，按近年物理类占比约72%估算物理 类考生约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平；省控线（物理类本科批）近年稳定在360–368分之间，2025年为367分，无明显波动；该校位于北京，对辽宁考生具有 较强地域吸引力；学校在辽宁物理类招生计划占比较小（约70余人），属跨省招生，本地考生规模变化对录取位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招约6.85%使竞争加剧、电气等王牌专业高热推荐吸引更多高分考生报考，以及本省考生总数基本持平等因素，在2025年基准12959名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次 约13542名，区间13042–14042名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8170 → 9934 → 10801 → 10639 → 12959, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4789 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 12959, a significant backward shift of 2320 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 70 students in both 2021 and 2022, 69 students in 2023 and 2024, and increased to 73 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 78 students, an expansion of about 6.85% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, and according to supply-demand dynamics, this will push the admission ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 84th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 75 and 84, indicating overall stability; the school's reputation evaluation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; its Douyin comprehensive popularity has not entered the national top 100, short video exposure is average, and application attention is at a medium level; Electrical Engineering is an A-level discipline (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is A- level, both disciplines highly correspond to the school's core enrollment majors (Electrical, Energy and Power), exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electrical Engineering and Automation was 'highly recommended', Energy and Power majors were 'recommended', and Computer/Electronic Information majors continued to be relatively hot; the total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category students estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72%, roughly the same as in 2025; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has been stable between 360–368 points in recent years, with 2025 at 367 points, showing no significant fluctuation; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Liaoning candidates; the school's enrollment plan in Liaoning for Physics Category accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 70+ students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, so changes in the local candidate population have limited impact on admission rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of about 6.85% in 2026 intensifying competition, the high recommendation of top majors like Electrical Engineering attracting more high-scoring candidates, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates in the province, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 12959; the predicted minimum ranking is about 13542, with a range of 13042–14042.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13042–14042, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 top majors (Electrical, Computer) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13000), you can focus on applying for A-level discipline majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 14000), it is recommended to mainly choose mid-level Tier 2 majors to ensure admission probability.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1507 → 1729 → 1905 → 2206 → 2025, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 518 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2025, slightly higher than 2024 (forward shift of 181 positions), with small fluctuations; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 students in 2021–2022, increased to 6 in 2023–2024, and dropped back to 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 5, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, indicating average application attention; Electrical Engineering (A-level) and Power Engineering (A- level) are its core strengths, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Foreign Languages, Public Administration, Network and New Media) have low relevance to these advantageous disciplines, limiting the appeal of the disciplines to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category enrollment majors, Law has a social popularity of 'differentiated wait-and-see', Foreign Languages is 'general wait-and-see', and Network and New Media is 'clearly discouraged'; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 200,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 56,400 based on the recent proportion of about 28%, similar to 2025; the provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 437 points, significantly up 37 points from 400 points in 2024, reflecting intensified overall competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Liaoning History Category candidates, but the enrollment plan is only 5 students, extremely small, making ranking fluctuations highly susceptible to the application behavior of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the rising provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, and the generally moderate popularity of History Category majors, a slight backward shift in ranking is expected based on the 2025 baseline of 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2055, with a range of 1685–2425.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 1685–2425, and only 5 History Category enrollment majors with very limited spots, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Administrative Management, English, Translation) as the main choices, Tier 1 Law as a reach, and Tier 3 Network and New Media as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 1700) can prioritize reaching for Law; candidates near the upper bound (around 2400) should consider Tier 2 majors first to ensure admission.
